summary: The diff partially implements the requirements but has critical gaps. REQ-1 (storing permanent admin email as constant) is implemented. REQ-2 (automatic admin role assignment) is missing - there's no evidence of automatic role assignment logic in user profile creation/retrieval. REQ-3 (admin authentication flow updates) is partially implemented with helper functions but lacks the core auto-assignment mechanism. The diff shows infrastructure changes (migration, helper functions) but not the actual automatic role assignment on login/profile creation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Automatically assign role = 'admin' when the logged-in user's email matches 'niranjanniranjan88464@gmail.com'
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows permanentAdminEmail constant and helper functions (isAdminOrPermanentAdmin, isAuthorizedUserOrPermanentAdmin) but no evidence of automatic role assignment during user profile creation or retrieval. The saveCallerUserProfile and getCallerUserProfile functions (truncated in diff) do not show logic to check email and set role to 'admin'.

missing_requirements.requirement: The isCallerAdmin function returns true for the permanent admin email
missing_requirements.reason: Helper functions like isAdminOrPermanentAdmin exist, but there's no evidence that isCallerAdmin() itself was updated to return true for the permanent admin email. The diff is truncated and doesn't show the isCallerAdmin implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: No manual role assignment or token setup is required for the permanent admin
missing_requirements.reason: Without automatic role assignment on profile creation/retrieval (REQ-2), the permanent admin would still require manual role setup. The helper functions check email but don't automatically assign the role.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module for UserProfile schema with principal field
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest contains no requirements for data migration or adding a principal field to UserProfile. This appears to be implementation detail not requested in the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Frontend ProfileSetupModal changes to include principal in profile data
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly states as a constraint: 'Do not modify frontend authentication components'. While ProfileSetupModal isn't explicitly listed, adding principal field to profile submission wasn't requested and appears to exceed the scope.
